Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class AchWithdrawal

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.AchWithdrawal
public class AchWithdrawal extends Object
AchWithdrawal

A withdrawal transfer using the ACH mechanism.

      public AchWithdrawal()

  • Method Details

    • amount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AchWithdrawalAmount> amount()
      The amount to withdraw in USD. The value should not be set if the withdrawal is `full_disbursement`.

    • bankRelationship

      public Optional<String> bankRelationship()
      The bank relationship to be used for the ACH withdrawal.

    • clientTransferId

      public Optional<String> clientTransferId()
      The external identifier supplied by the API caller. Each request must have a unique pairing of `client_transfer_id` and `account`.

    • memo

      public Optional<String> memo()
      The memo that will appear on the customer's bank statement.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The resource name of the ACH withdrawal.

    • retirementDistribution

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RetirementDistribution> retirementDistribution()
      The retirement distribution details.

    • state

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AchWithdrawalState> state()
      The current state of the ACH withdrawal.

    • builder

      public static AchWithdrawal.Builder builder()

      The amount to withdraw in USD. The value should not be set if the withdrawal is `full_disbursement`.
